Meta.title: Razan Hijama Riyadh — Licensed Home-Visit Cupping Therapy
Meta.description: Home-visit hijama in Riyadh. Licensed prophetic cupping on sunnah days — we come to you with single-use sterile tools and full on-site sterilization. Certified practitioners, total privacy at home. Book online in under a minute.
Meta.ogAlt: Razan Hijama — Home-Visit Cupping Therapy in Riyadh
Meta.keywords: hijama home visit Riyadh, hijama Riyadh, mobile hijama Riyadh, home cupping therapy Riyadh, cupping at home Riyadh, prophetic medicine Saudi Arabia, sunnah cupping home visit, wet cupping Riyadh home, MoH licensed hijama, sunnah days hijama, حجامة منزلية الرياض, حجامة في البيت الرياض, حجامة متنقلة الرياض, الحجامة في الرياض, حجامة نبوية, حجامة السنة

Hero.title: The sunnah of healing,
Hero.subtitle: Home-visit hijama across Riyadh. We come to you with reverence for the sunnah, clinical precision, and considered hospitality — MoH-licensed practitioner, single-use sterile instruments, full on-site sterilization, and total privacy in your own home.

Benefits.title: A prophetic therapy that modern medicine respects
Benefits.subtitle: Wet cupping has been shown to support circulation, ease chronic pain, and improve recovery. Every benefit below is grounded in clinical reviews and our daily practice.

circulation.title: Circulation
circulation.body: Hijama stimulates local blood flow and helps relieve vascular stasis in treated areas.

detox.title: Cellular renewal
detox.body: Wet cupping aids the removal of stagnant interstitial fluid and supports tissue renewal.

pain.title: Chronic pain relief
pain.body: Strongest evidence is for lower-back, neck, shoulder pain, and migraine.

immune.title: Immune support
immune.body: Mild local trauma triggers a controlled inflammatory response that supports immune activity.

stress.title: Stress & sleep
stress.body: Patients consistently report deeper sleep and lower stress in the days that follow.

energy.title: Renewed energy
energy.body: A lighter, more energetic feeling is reported by most patients within a week.

Sunnah.title: “Indeed, the best of remedies you have is hijama.”
Sunnah.body: Hijama is among the most emphasized therapies in the prophetic tradition. At Razan we keep this practice alive with modern clinical standards, performed in the quiet of your own home, and we align our calendar with the recommended sunnah days.
Sunnah.daysBody: The 17th, 19th, and 21st of every Hijri month — as narrated from the Prophet ﷺ.

Services.title: Home-visit hijama packages
Services.subtitle: Three packages built around real patient needs — performed in your home anywhere in Riyadh. Every session includes a consultation, full on-site sterilization, and a post-session report.

classic.name: Sunnah Hijama
classic.description: Preventive wet cupping at the primary sunnah points (kahil & akhda'ayn). Ideal for general wellness on the sunnah days, performed in your home.

therapeutic.name: Therapeutic Hijama
therapeutic.description: Pain-focused protocol for back, shoulder, and sciatic pain — paired with light adjunct massage and a 7-day WhatsApp follow-up.

home.name: Comprehensive Hijama
home.description: Our most thorough package — multi-area protocol, extended consultation, lifestyle and diet guidance, and a 14-day follow-up. The full reset.

Gallery.title: Real results from our patients
Gallery.subtitle: Drag the slider on any card to compare. Published with consent; individual outcomes may vary.

Testimonials.title: Trust, built one session at a time
Testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from real patients, published only with consent.
Testimonials.emptyTitle: Your story could be the first
Testimonials.emptyBody: Razan has just opened its doors. After your session, we'd be grateful if you shared a word — your honest experience will help guide the patients who come after you.

Reviews.metaDescription: Read every approved patient review for Razan Hijama Center. Honest experiences, published only with consent.
Reviews.title: What our patients say
Reviews.subtitle: Every approved review from our patients — sorted by featured stories first, then newest.
Reviews.emptyBody: We've just opened. Be among the first to share your experience after your session.

0.a: It feels like a light pinch during the small superficial scratches. Most patients describe it as far easier than expected, and it's over quickly.

1.a: Between 30 and 60 minutes including consultation, depending on the package.

2.a: Yes. Our practitioner is licensed by the Saudi Ministry of Health under the complementary medicine framework, and we carry the same sterile-supply standards as a licensed clinic.

3.a: The 17th, 19th, and 21st of each Hijri month. We open extra slots on those days.

4.a: For pregnant women, those with bleeding disorders, or on blood thinners. We'll assess in your consultation.

5.a: We're a home-visit service — every session takes place in your home anywhere in Riyadh. The practitioner brings a portable medical-grade kit, performs full on-site sterilization, and leaves your home exactly as it was.

Map.title: Home-visit hijama, anywhere in Riyadh
Map.subtitle: Tell us your neighbourhood and a time that suits you — we travel to your home with a full portable kit and leave it exactly as we found it.

Contact.title: Got a question? We're here.
Contact.subtitle: Leave us a message and we'll reply within one business hour.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message received. We'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Could not send the message. Please try again.

CTA.title: Begin your journey with Razan
CTA.subtitle: Book in under a minute. We'll help you choose the right package for your case.

Footer.tagline: Razan — home-visit hijama, the sunnah of healing brought to your door.
Footer.newsletterBody: One short, useful note from our practitioners every two weeks. Never spam.

Whatsapp.label: Chat on WhatsApp
Whatsapp.prefilled: As-salamu alaykum, I'd like to book a hijama appointment.

Booking.metaDescription: Reserve your session at Razan — pick a package and a time in under a minute.
Booking.title: Book your appointment in a few steps
Booking.subtitle: Choose a package, pick a time, share your details — a WhatsApp confirmation lands instantly.

step1.title: Choose your package
step1.subtitle: Three packages tailored to different needs — every session includes a consultation and full sterilization.

step2.title: When works for you?
step2.subtitle: Pick a day and time. Dates marked in gold are the recommended sunnah days (17, 19, 21 Hijri).
step2.noSlots: No slots available on this day — try another.

step3.title: Your details
step3.subtitle: We need your name and mobile to send the booking confirmation.
step3.name: Full name
step3.mapsUrlHint: Open Google Maps on your phone → long-press your home → tap Share → Copy link → paste it here. This is the easiest way for us to find you.

location.homeNote: We'll travel to your address in Riyadh — please enter it below.

step4.title: How will you pay?
step4.subtitle: Pick the payment method that works for you. You can change this later by replying on WhatsApp.

payment.note: Whatever you pick, you're not charged at booking — payment happens at the visit (cash) or before (transfer). We never ask for card details over WhatsApp.

CASH.name: Cash on arrival
CASH.description: Pay in cash directly to the practitioner when they arrive. Have the exact amount ready if possible.

TRANSFER.name: Bank transfer · Mada Atheer · STC Pay
TRANSFER.description: We'll send you our IBAN / phone number via WhatsApp after you book. Transfer the amount and send us the receipt before the visit.

ONLINE_CARD.name: Pay online · Card · Apple Pay · Tabby
ONLINE_CARD.description: Card and BNPL payments are launching soon. We're finalizing the merchant setup with our payment provider.

step5.title: Review your booking
step5.subtitle: Double-check the details. We'll WhatsApp you to confirm in minutes.
step5.name: Name
step5.terms: By confirming you accept our cancellation policy and agree that the clinic may contact you on WhatsApp to finalize the appointment.

confirmed.title: Your booking is in
confirmed.subtitle: Thank you {name} — we'll WhatsApp you shortly to confirm the appointment.
confirmed.name: Name

paymentMethod.TRANSFER: Bank transfer · Mada Atheer · STC Pay

confirmed.approvalNote: Your appointment is pending our review. You'll receive a final WhatsApp confirmation shortly.
confirmed.whatsappPrefilled: As-salamu alaykum, I just booked a hijama appointment and want to confirm it.

Chat.title: Ask Razan
Chat.subtitle: We usually reply instantly
Chat.greetingBody: Ask about hijama, our services, sunnah days, or how to book. We won't give medical advice — just clear, practical answers.
Chat.starter1: What's the difference between your services?
Chat.starter2: When are the sunnah days this month?
Chat.starter3: How do I book an appointment?
Chat.disclaimer: Replies are AI-generated. For medical advice, please consult a doctor.
Chat.errorRateLimit: Too many messages — please wait a moment and try again.
Chat.errorOffline: AI chat is offline. Please WhatsApp us instead.
Chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Review.title: How was your session?
Review.subtitle: Your honest words help guide patients who come after you. Takes less than a minute.
Review.ratingLabel: How would you rate your experience?
Review.bodyPlaceholder: Tell future patients what stood out — was it the calm space, the practitioner's care, the result? At least a few sentences.
Review.moderation: Reviews are read by our team before publishing — usually within a day.
Review.thanksBody: We've received your review and will publish it shortly after a quick check. Your honesty helps us — and the next patient walking in.
Review.alreadyBody: We've recorded one review for this session. Jazakum Allahu khayran for your time.
Review.notEligibleBody: We'll send you a link to share your experience once your appointment is complete.
Review.notFoundBody: This review link is no longer valid or has expired. If you'd like to share your experience, please reach out to us on WhatsApp.
Review.errorNotEligible: Reviews can only be left for completed sessions.
Review.errorAlreadyReviewed: A review for this session has already been submitted.
Review.errorInvalid: Please fill in all fields correctly.
Review.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.
